scripts.deploy: tauri build && bun -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');if(!fs.existsSync('target'))fs.mkdirSync('target');const src=p.join('src-tauri','target','release','bundle','nsis');if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.readdirSync(src).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.exe')).forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(p.join(src,f),p.join('target',f)));console.log('\x1b[32m✅ 打包文件已提取到 gameIndex/target 目录下！\x1b[0m');}"
